case_title: PALMARES,THOMAS VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $260.00 FILED BY PALMARES,THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
